summary.en: Tunisia projects may specify IEC 62196 connector configurations, often through buyer, fleet, public-charging, or engineering requirements rather than a single public national EV-charger connector mandate. IEC 62196 covers plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors, and vehicle inlets for conductive EV charging; the exact Type 2, CCS, CHAdeMO, or other interface should be confirmed in the tender, vehicle fleet, and site design.
summary.zh: 突尼斯项目可能通过买方、车队、公用充电或工程要求指定IEC 62196连接器配置，而不一定存在单一公开的全国充电桩连接器强制命令。IEC 62196覆盖电动汽车传导充电用插头、插座、车辆连接器和车辆插座；具体Type 2、CCS、CHAdeMO或其他接口应按招标、车辆车队和现场设计确认。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞項目可能通過買方、車隊、公用充電或工程要求指定IEC 62196連接器配置，而不一定存在單一公開的全國充電樁連接器強制命令。IEC 62196覆蓋電動汽車傳導充電用插頭、插座、車輛連接器和車輛插座；具體Type 2、CCS、CHAdeMO或其他介面應按招標、車輛車隊和現場設計確認。

summary.en: China EVSE commonly uses GB/T 20234.1, GB/T 20234.2, and GB/T 20234.3 connector interfaces. These are not automatically interoperable with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS configurations, and adapters should not be assumed acceptable for public or fleet charging unless the electrical, communication, locking, safety, and liability requirements are approved.
summary.zh: 中国EVSE通常使用GB/T 20234.1、GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3连接接口。这些接口不会自动与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS配置互操作；除非电气、通信、锁止、安全和责任要求已获批准，不应假定适配器可用于公用或车队充电。
summary.zht: 中國EVSE通常使用GB/T 20234.1、GB/T 20234.2和GB/T 20234.3連接介面。這些介面不會自動與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS配置互操作；除非電氣、通信、鎖止、安全和責任要求已獲批准，不應假定轉接器可用於公用或車隊充電。

gap.en: Lock the export connector bill of materials before shipment. Confirm the vehicle inlet population in Tunisia, AC and DC connector type, cable assembly rating, locking and proximity functions, communication protocol, adapter policy, replacement parts, and labeling language.
gap.zh: 出货前应锁定出口连接器物料清单。确认突尼斯车辆接口存量、交流和直流连接器类型、电缆组件额定值、锁止和接近检测功能、通信协议、适配器政策、备件和标签语言。
gap.zht: 出貨前應鎖定出口連接器物料清單。確認突尼西亞車輛介面存量、交流和直流連接器類型、電纜組件額定值、鎖止和接近檢測功能、通信協議、轉接器政策、備件和標籤語言。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific unless Tunisian regulation, INNORPI adoption, tender, fleet specification, public-charging rule, or site approval mandates a particular IEC 62196 interface
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 evidence is China-market connector evidence; it is supporting evidence only for Tunisia unless the target project accepts the GB/T interface

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector shape is a market-access issue, not a paperwork translation issue. A GB/T 20234 charger should be treated as a different interface unless Tunisia project documents expressly accept it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 连接器形态属于市场接入问题，不是文件翻译问题。除非突尼斯项目文件明确接受，否则GB/T 20234充电桩应按不同接口处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 連接器形態屬於市場接入問題，不是文件翻譯問題。除非突尼西亞項目文件明確接受，否則GB/T 20234充電樁應按不同介面處理。
